members.name: ExcerptEntry
members.signature: keyword_struct ExcerptEntry { ... }
members.comment: A pruned source block shown below a search result: owns `label` and `code`, borrows `file_path` and `lang`.

members.name: FileMatchItem
members.signature: keyword_struct FileMatchItem { ... }
members.comment: Manages file match items with ownership and invariants; ensures consistent state across operations.

members.name: createEmbedderWithFallback
members.signature: fn createEmbedderWithFallback(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, cfg: *const config_mod.ProjectConfig) -> vector_mod.EmbeddingProvider
members.comment:
Create an embedding provider, falling back to NoopEmbedding when the
configured provider fails to initialise.  The caller must call
`embedder.deinit()` when done.

members.name: makeLlmConfig
members.signature: fn makeLlmConfig(ea: ExplainArgs) -> llm.LlmConfig
members.comment: Construct an LlmConfig from the parsed ExplainArgs.

members.name: resolveLlmConfigForThinking
members.signature: fn resolveLlmConfigForThinking(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, cfg: *const config_mod.ProjectConfig, model_ref: []const u8, explicit_api_url: ?[]const u8) -> struct { api_url: []const u8, model: []const u8, think: ?bool, resolved_url: ?[]const u8 }
members.returns: struct { api_url: []const u8, model: []const u8, think: ?bool, resolved_url: ?[]const u8 }
members.comment:
Central control point for LLM configuration with thinking model support.

If model matches the thinking slot:
  - Force Ollama /api/chat endpoint (required for think parameter)
  - Set think = true

Returns owned memory in resolved_url (caller must free).

members.name: FilterMode
members.signature: keyword_enum FilterMode { ... }
members.comment:
Dispatch to single-file, explicit-scan, or full-workspace processing.
Whether LLM relevance filtering should be applied on the staged path.

members.name: auto
members.comment: Auto-detect: apply LLM filter only for long queries (5+ words).

members.name: force
members.comment: Always apply LLM filter (even for short queries).

members.name: skip
members.comment: Never apply LLM filter (always fast path).

members.name: ExplainArgs
members.signature: keyword_struct ExplainArgs { ... }
members.comment: Manages query parameters and options; owned by the engine; ensures consistent argument handling.

members.name: isShortQuery
members.signature: fn isShortQuery(query: []const u8) -> bool
members.comment:
Return true when the query is "short" (fast path, no LLM filter).
Short queries: 2 or fewer words, AND not ending with "?", AND not starting
with question words (if, how, where, when, does, why, what).

members.name: collectSkillExcerpts
members.signature: fn collectSkillExcerpts(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, top_json_path: []const u8, guidance_dir: []const u8, workspace: []const u8) -> []SkillExcerpt
members.comment:
Phase A: Load skill excerpts for the top search result's JSON guidance file.
Returns owned slice; caller must free each `.name` and `.excerpt`, then free the slice.

members.name: collectSourceExcerpts
members.signature: fn collectSourceExcerpts(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, results: []const SearchResult, search_terms: []const []const u8, workspace: []const u8) -> []ExcerptEntry
members.comment:
Phase B: Collect up to 3 source excerpts, preferring exact-name matches.
Returns owned slice; caller must free each `.label` and `.code`, then free the slice.

members.name: grepTopFiles
members.signature: fn grepTopFiles(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, results: []const SearchResult, search_terms: []const []const u8, workspace: []const u8) -> []FileMatchItem
members.comment:
Phase C: Grep top result files for search-term matches.
Returns owned slice; caller must free each `.lines`, then free the slice.

members.name: renderExplainOutput
members.signature: fn renderExplainOutput(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, query_text: []const u8, results: []const SearchResult, search_terms: []const []const u8, ai_summary: ?[]const u8, skill_excerpts: []const SkillExcerpt, excerpts: []const ExcerptEntry, file_matches: []const FileMatchItem) -> void
members.comment: Phase E: Render the legacy explain output to stdout.

members.name: cmdExplain
members.signature: fn cmdExplain(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, args: []const []const u8) -> void
members.comment: Processes a Zig command string, validating arguments and preparing output.

members.name: loadUsedByFromJson
members.signature: fn loadUsedByFromJson(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, json_path: []const u8) -> ?[][]const u8
members.comment:
Load `used_by` array from a guidance JSON file.
Returns an owned slice of owned strings, or null on failure / empty.

members.name: isExactNameMatch
members.signature: fn isExactNameMatch(name: []const u8, terms: []const []const u8) -> bool
members.comment: Return true when `name` (case-insensitive) exactly equals any search term.

members.name: loadSkillsFromJson
members.signature: fn loadSkillsFromJson(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, json_path: []const u8) -> ?[]const u8
members.comment:
Load skills listed in a guidance JSON file as a newline-separated string.
Returns an owned allocation or null if the file is absent or has no skills.

members.name: loadPublicMemberNames
members.signature: fn loadPublicMemberNames(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, json_path: []const u8) -> ?[][]const u8
members.comment:
Load public non-test member names from a guidance JSON file.
Returns an owned slice of owned strings, or null on failure.

members.name: loadSkillPara
members.signature: fn loadSkillPara(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, guidance_dir: []const u8, cwd: []const u8, skill_name: []const u8) -> ?[]const u8
members.comment:
Load the first paragraph (or `description:` front-matter value) of a SKILL.md.
Searches `<guidance_dir>/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` and `<cwd>/doc/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`.
Returns an owned allocation or null if not found.

members.name: explainExtractExcerpt
members.signature: fn explainExtractExcerpt(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, src: []const u8, start_line: u32, node_type: []const u8) -> []const u8
members.comment:
Extract the source block starting at `start_line` (1-based).
Stops at the next col-0 top-level declaration or after MAX_LINES, whichever
comes first.  Then prunes trailing blank and comment-only lines.
Returns an owned allocation; caller must free.

members.name: explainGrepFile
members.signature: fn explainGrepFile(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, file_path: []const u8, terms: []const []const u8, max_results: usize) -> []usize
members.comment:
Grep a file for search terms (case-insensitive substring, skipping comment lines).
Returns owned slice of matching line numbers (caller frees).

members.name: buildLlmSummary
members.signature: fn buildLlmSummary(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, client: *llm.LlmClient, query_text: []const u8, results: []const SearchResult, skill_excerpts_in: []const SkillExcerpt, excerpts_in: []const ExcerptEntry) -> ?[]const u8
members.comment:
Build LLM synthesis: skill context + member index + excerpts → prompt → summary.
Strips "absence" sentences.  Returns owned string or null on failure.

members.name: loadAliases
members.signature: fn loadAliases(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, guidance_dir: []const u8) -> ?vector_db_mod.SemanticAliases
members.comment: Load semantic aliases from the guidance directory.

members.name: llmExtractKeyTerms
members.signature: fn llmExtractKeyTerms(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, client: *llm.LlmClient, query: []const u8) -> ?[][]const u8
members.comment:
Extract key technical terms from a long query using LLM.
Returns owned slice of owned strings. Caller must free.

members.name: tokenizeCapabilityWords
members.signature: fn tokenizeCapabilityWords(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, text: []const u8, out: *std.ArrayList([]const u8)) -> void
members.comment:
Tokenize `text` into lowercase capability words, filtering stop words
and tokens shorter than 3 characters. Appends to `out`.

members.name: computeDriftFollowUps
members.signature: fn computeDriftFollowUps(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, query_text: []const u8, results: []const SearchResult) -> []const []const u8
members.comment:
Compute deterministic DRIFT follow-up queries.

Tokenizes query into "needed" capabilities and result module/names into
"available" capabilities. Returns allocator-owned slice of "Provide <cap>"
strings for each missing capability. Always returns a heap-allocated slice
(safe to free even when empty).

members.name: cmdExplainStaged
members.signature: fn cmdExplainStaged(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, db: *GuidanceDb, query_text: []const u8, workspace: []const u8, guidance_dir: []const u8, llm_config: llm.LlmConfig, fast_model_ref: []const u8, ea: ExplainArgs) -> void
members.comment:
Full staged explain pipeline.  Called when `--staged` is active (default).

Pipeline:
  Short query (≤3 words) or --no-llm or --filter=skip:
    executeStaged() → formatStaged() → output
  Long query (4+ words) with LLM:
    executeStaged() → llmFilter() → expandFollowUps() → synthesize() → formatStaged() → output

members.name: emitStagedOutput
members.signature: fn emitStagedOutput(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, query_text: []const u8, stages: []const types.Stage, summary: ?[]const u8, followup_keywords: ?[]const []const u8, workspace: []const u8) -> void
members.comment: Write formatted staged output to stdout and flush.

members.name: isExactNameMatchPub
members.signature: fn isExactNameMatchPub(name: []const u8, terms: []const []const u8) -> bool
members.comment: Checks if a list of name bytes exactly matches a list of term bytes, returning true or false.

members.name: loadSkillsFromJsonPub
members.signature: fn loadSkillsFromJsonPub(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, json_path: []const u8) -> ?[]const u8
members.comment: Loads skill data from a JSON path into a Zig array of bytes.

members.name: loadUsedByFromJsonPub
members.signature: fn loadUsedByFromJsonPub(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, json_path: []const u8) -> ?[][]const u8
members.comment: Loads used data from a JSON path into a Zig array of arrays of bytes.

members.name: loadPublicMemberNamesPub
members.signature: fn loadPublicMemberNamesPub(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, json_path: []const u8) -> ?[][]const u8
members.comment: Loads public member names from a JSON path into a Zig array of arrays.

members.name: loadSkillParaPub
members.signature: fn loadSkillParaPub(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, guidance_dir: []const u8, cwd: []const u8, skill_name: []const u8) -> ?[]const u8
members.comment: Loads a skill parameter pack into a Zig slice, handling allocation and data parsing.

members.name: explainExtractExcerptPub
members.signature: fn explainExtractExcerptPub(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, src: []const u8, start_line: u32, node_type: []const u8) -> []const u8
members.comment: Extracts and explains a specified excerpt from a Zig source file, returning its contents.

members.name: explainGrepFilePub
members.signature: fn explainGrepFilePub(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, file_path: []const u8, terms: []const []const u8, max_results: usize) -> []usize
members.comment: Analyzes a file path and returns matching result indices.

members.name: isShortQueryPub
members.signature: fn isShortQueryPub(query: []const u8) -> bool
members.comment: Checks if a query string is short enough for a public query, returning true or false.

members.name: cmdShow
members.signature: fn cmdShow(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, args: []const []const u8) -> void
members.comment: Displays a specified query result using the allocator and argument list.

members.name: TestQuery
members.signature: keyword_struct TestQuery { ... }
members.comment: A scored test query used in the explain accuracy test suite.

members.name: BenchmarkResult
members.signature: keyword_struct BenchmarkResult { ... }
members.comment: Tracks benchmark metrics with a fixed-size buffer pool; managed centrally; not thread-safe.

members.name: cmdTest
members.signature: fn cmdTest(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, args: []const []const u8) -> void
members.comment: Validates command arguments and processes them in the Zig engine.

members.name: parseScoreFromLine
members.signature: fn parseScoreFromLine(line: []const u8) -> ?u8
members.comment:
Parse a 0-10 score from an LLM evaluation response line of the form:
"Label: <digits>[/10]" — also handles markdown decorations like "**", "-".
Returns null when no score digit can be extracted after the first colon.

members.name: loadBenchmarkQueries
members.signature: fn loadBenchmarkQueries(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, guidance_dir: []const u8) -> []TestQuery
members.comment:
Load benchmark queries from {guidance_dir}/benchmarks.txt.
One query per line; blank lines and # comments are skipped.
Returns an error if the file cannot be opened.

members.name: generateTestQueries
members.signature: fn generateTestQueries(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, guidance_dir: []const u8) -> []TestQuery
members.comment: Generate test queries from module-level comments in guidance JSON files.

members.name: cmdTelemetry
members.signature: fn cmdTelemetry(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, args: []const []const u8) -> void
members.comment: `guidance telemetry [--top-queries N] [--slowest N] [--tier-breakdown]`

members.name: cmdCacheStats
members.signature: fn cmdCacheStats(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, args: []const []const u8) -> void
members.comment: `guidance cache-stats`

members.name: cmdServe
members.signature: fn cmdServe(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, args: []const []const u8) -> void
members.comment:
`guidance serve` — starts the MCP server on STDIO.
Implemented in mcp.zig; this is the dispatch entry point.

members.name: cmdRalph
members.signature: fn cmdRalph(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, args: []const []const u8) -> void
members.comment:
`guidance ralph <query>` — run the query through Read→Ask→Learn→Plan stages
and emit the result as markdown. Uses the same DB setup as cmdExplain.

members.name: isShortQuery: three words is not short
isShortQuery: question mark makes it not short
isShortQuery: question word prefixes make it not short
isShortQuery: regular two-word queries are short
